data.Modification: Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K

project.title: Thermus thermophilus HB27-IB-Cascade-LCMS
project.projectDescription: Identification of the protein composition of the type I-B CRISPR effector complex from different HB27 strains.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The Cascade complex was purified from different HB27 strains using affinity chromatography and size exclusion chromatography.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS raw data were analyzed with MaxQuant (1.6.6.0) using the Andromeda database search algorithm. Spectra files were searched against the Thermus thermophilus HB27 protein sequence database downloaded from Uniprot.

references.referenceLine: Wei J, Shao Y, Liang Y, Bu X, Zhou W, Liang Y, Li Y. A type III-associated Cas6 functions as a negative regulator of type I-B CRISPR-Cas system in Thermus thermophilus. Commun Biol. 2025 8(1):793

identifiedPTMStrings.name: No PTMs are included in the dataset

Comment[Separation]: Peptide samples were injected into a C18 Trap column (75 µm × 2 cm, 3 µm particle size, 100 Å pore size), and separated in a reversed-phase C18 analytical column packed in-house with ReproSil-Pur C18-AQ resin (75 µm × 25 cm, 1.9 µm particle size, 100 Å pore size)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: The MS was operated in DDA top20 mode with a full scan range of 350–1500 m/z
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: Precursor ion selection window was kept at 1.4 m/z
